title: STELLA MARIS and THE PASSENGER
text: IN 2022, A GLOBAL LITERARY EVENT: Cormac McCarthy’s first novels in more than a decade STELLA MARIS and THE PASSENGER The Passenger is the story of a salvage diver, haunted by loss, afraid of the watery deep, pursued for a conspiracy beyond his understanding, and longing for a death he cannot reconcile with God. Stella Maris is the story of a mathematician, twenty years old, admitted to the hospital with forty thousand dollars in a plastic bag and one request: She does not want to talk about her brother. Set eight years apart, this remarkable interconnected story of two siblings is a new two-book masterpiece from a giant of American literature, one that challenges our notions of morality, faith, truth, and human existence. Available in hardback, eBook, trade paperback and digital audio formats Autumn 2022 Also available as a limited edition slipcase boxed set
